executives.name: Omar Ishrak
executives.background: Dr. Omar Ishrak has been a director since 2017 and served as Chairman from 2020 to 2023. He was Chairman and CEO of Medtronic plc from 2011 to 2020.

executives.name: Ronald Sugar
executives.background: Dr. Sugar is the former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation, where he served from 2003 to 2010.

executives.name: Wanda Austin
executives.background: Dr. Austin is the former President and CEO of The Aerospace Corporation, a leading architect for the nation’s national security space programs. She served in this role from 2008 to 2016.
